title: Add quotation request form for dismantling services

requirements.text: Create a quotation request form component that allows companies to submit details about sites they need dismantled, including fields for company name, contact person, phone number, email, site type (hotel/office/company/other), site address, approximate size or scope, and additional notes
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all required fields: company name, contact person, phone number, email, site type dropdown, site address, size/scope, and notes textarea
Form validates required fields before submission
Form follows existing design patterns from DealerProfileSetup.tsx and CompanyProfileSetup.tsx
Form uses consistent styling with earthy color scheme (greens, browns, oranges)
Form displays success toast notification on submission

requirements.text: Add backend functionality to store and retrieve quotation requests with fields for company name, contact person, phone number, email, site type, site address, size information, additional notes, submission timestamp, and requester principal
acceptanceCriteria: Backend defines a QuotationRequest type with all required fields
Backend provides a function to submit new quotation requests
Backend provides a function to retrieve quotation requests (accessible by authorized users)
Quotation requests are stored persistently in stable storage
Each quotation request is associated with the submitter's principal for tracking

requirements.text: Integrate the quotation request form into the landing page services section with a prominent call-to-action button that opens the form in a modal or navigates to a dedicated page
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Request Quote' or 'Get Quote' button is added to the dismantling services card in the services section
Button uses consistent styling with other call-to-action elements
Clicking the button opens the quotation form (modal or dedicated route)
Form is accessible without requiring authentication
Form submission provides clear feedback to the user

constraints: Follow existing form patterns from DealerProfileSetup.tsx and CompanyProfileSetup.tsx
Use existing color scheme and design system (earthy tones: greens, browns, oranges)
Preserve immutable frontend paths (hooks/useInternetIdentity, hooks/useActor, main.tsx, components/ui)
nonGoals: Email notification system for new quotation requests
Admin dashboard for managing quotation requests
Automatic quote calculation or pricing logic
